news.headline: Haslinda Amin gives insight on 04/10/2025 at Bloomberg.com.

news.summary: The Global Intramedullary Nail Market was valued at USD 920.4 million in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 1,537 million by 2032, growing at a CAGR of 7.6%. North America is expected to be the largest market with over USD 329.35 million in 2025, driven by the growing geriatric population. The trochanteric nails segment holds the largest market share due to their use in hip fracture fixation procedures. Europe is the second-largest market with over USD 264.91 million in 2025, supported by key players and reimbursement policies. The market is expected to experience significant growth due to factors like rising fracture incidence and market players' presence.
news.headline: Global Intramedullary Nail Market valued at USD 920.4 million in 2025; projected to reach USD 1,537 million by 2032, growing at 7.6% CAGR. North America expected to lead with over USD 329.35 million market share in 2025. Europe second-largest market with USD 264.91 million market share. Trochanteric nails segment holds largest market share.
Goldman Sachs cuts China GDP growth forecasts for 2025 and 2026

news.summary: As the Australian government takes steps to tackle the issue of individuals being debanked, the CEO of Westpac has issued an apology. This move comes amidst growing concerns about financial exclusion, with a significant number of people being affected. The CEO's apology signals recognition of the seriousness of the situation and a commitment to addressing the issue. The Australian government's response to debanking issues highlights the importance of ensuring access to essential financial services for all citizens.
news.headline: Westpac CEO apologizes for freezing customer funds over Bitcoin transfer as government tackles debanking.

news.summary: Insight Health, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven healthcare solutions, has recently revealed a key development in collaboration with Office Practicum, a leading provider of electronic health record (EHR) solutions tailored for pediatrics. The partnership aims to combine Insight Health's cutting-edge AI technology with Office Practicum's extensive pediatric knowledge and substantial clinical data pool. This initiative will result in the creation of a specialized AI documentation assistant customized for pediatric processes. Through this strategic partnership, Insight Health and Office Practicum are set to revolutionize pediatric healthcare workflows by incorporating advanced AI capabilities.
news.headline: Insight Health and Office Practicum partner to revolutionize pediatric documentation with AI, advancing healthcare efficiency.

news.summary: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (Nasdaq: FFAI) shared that it took part in the Jones Technology and Innovation Conference at The Venetian Resort in Las Vegas. The California-based company, known for its global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem, had its Global President, Jerry Wang, as a guest speaker. The event was investor-focused and provided a platform for Wang to deliver a speech to the audience in attendance.
news.headline: Jerry Wang, Global President of Faraday Future, spoke at Jones Technology and Innovation Conference in Las Vegas. Faraday Future is a California-based intelligent electric mobility company.

news.summary: A recent report by Northern Trust, conducted through a survey of 180 asset owners worldwide, highlights investment portfolios of varying sizes, spanning from $1 billion to more than $500 billion. The study provides insights into asset allocation decisions among these global allocators.
news.headline: Northern Trust's report examines priorities of 180 global asset owners with portfolios from $1B to over $500B.

news.summary: The recent sell-off in Ether (ETH) led to a loss of the crucial $1,500 support level, suggesting a potential deeper correction ahead. Ether's price dropped below its realized price, signaling bearish momentum. Previous instances of this led to significant price drops, like the 51% fall after the Terra Luna crash in June 2022. Weakness is also seen in Spot Ethereum ETF flows, with $94.1 million outflows over two weeks. The lack of investor interest is reflected across Ether products, with $37.4 million outflows from Ethereum investment funds. Additionally, low open interest, negative funding rates, and declining network activity indicate further downside potential for ETH, potentially bottoming at $1,000. Competing layer-1 blockchains are gaining traction as Ethereum's market share faces challenges. This article does not provide investment advice.
news.headline: Ethereum struggles as price falls: Reasons include low ETF flows, weak derivatives market, and competition from other blockchains.
F1's costly return to Africa faces challenges.

news.summary: In Bern, Switzerland, Mondelēz International (Nasdaq: MDLZ) has unveiled a substantial investment totaling approximately 65 million Swiss Francs into its Toblerone manufacturing plant. This move aims to establish a worldwide center of excellence for Toblerone in Bern, Switzerland, enhancing the export of the brand and chocolate knowledge globally. This investment underscores the company's dedication to the birthplace of Toblerone in 1908.
news.headline: Mondelēz invests ~65 million CHF in Toblerone facility in Bern, creating global excellence center for brand export.
First-quarter revenue reaches €239 million, showing a 14% increase in sales.
2024 annual report audited for verification, ensuring accuracy in numbers.

news.summary: In the latest report, it has been stated that the global unemployment rate has reached 5.7%, with around 197 million people unemployed. The report also highlighted that there has been a decrease in youth unemployment, which now stands at 11.7%. In addition, it was noted that the average duration of unemployment is 20 weeks. The report emphasized the need for countries to implement policies that promote job creation and support those who are unemployed. It also suggested focusing on upskilling and reskilling programs to enhance employment opportunities.
news.headline: Fagron to unveil new growth plan and financial goals for 2025 at Capital Markets Day.

news.summary: A partnership has been formed to develop a top-tier integrated refining and petrochemical complex in Yanbu Industrial City, Saudi Arabia. This initiative comes on the 10th anniversary of the Yanbu Refinery joint venture. One of the collaborators is China Petroleum & Chemical Corporation, also known as Sinopec. The project is set to enhance the refining and petrochemical capabilities in the area. This collaboration represents a significant milestone towards establishing a world-class industrial facility. The news was released on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Sinopec and Aramco to expand Yanbu Refinery, 10th year collaboration. Aim to create world-class complex.

news.summary: China's government issued cautions to its citizens concerning travel to the U.S. due to worsening bilateral relations amidst escalating trade tensions. Beijing announced intentions to increase reciprocal tariffs on American products from 34% to 84%, in response to President Donald Trump's recent tariff increases on Chinese goods. The Ministry of Culture and Tourism advised Chinese tourists to evaluate risks carefully, attributing the warning to deteriorating Sino-U.S. economic relations and security concerns within the U.S. This measure came in light of the ongoing trade dispute between the two countries.
news.headline: China warns citizens against US travel citing worsening relations and increased security risks, and raised reciprocal tariffs on American goods to 84% from 34% in response to Trump's recent tariff hikes on Chinese products.
BOJ offers to provide government debt immediately (afternoon offer)

news.summary: Magic Eden, a Solana NFT marketplace, acquires crypto trading app Slingshot to expand offerings beyond NFTs amidst market downturn. Magic Eden now supports over 8M tokens across major blockchains. Slingshot boasts nearly 1M users with access to tokens on 10 blockchains using a universal USDC balance. Magic Eden aims to attract more users from centralized exchanges to on-chain platforms. In 2024, Magic Eden made $75M from its NFT marketplace, plans to increase with Slingshot. NFT marketplaces like DraftKings and GameStop closing due to declining volumes. NFT market has seen $1.6B in sales across 14M transactions in 2025, less than $8.9B in 2024. Monthly sales volume declining in 2025.
news.headline: Magic Eden, the Solana NFT marketplace, acquires Slingshot to broaden beyond NFTs amid market downturn. Source confirms.

news.summary: On a recent episode of CNBC's "Mad Money Lightning Round," Jim Cramer recommended purchasing GRAIL, Inc. (NASDAQ: GRAL), expressing a strong preference for the stock. This sentiment was echoed by Morgan Stanley analyst Tejas Savant, who on March 18, increased the price target for GRAL from $16 to $20. Cramer expressed hesitation regarding Turkcell Iletisim Hizmetleri A.S. (NYSE: TKC), likening it to a risky gamble, stating it was too speculative for his liking. In terms of earnings, Turkcell reported a fiscal year net profit of 23.52 billion Lira, a notable increase from the previous year's profit of 18.13 billion Lira, during a disclosure on Feb. 27. When discussing Block, Inc. (NYSE: XYZ), Cramer advised initiating a half position immediately, with the possibility of buying more if the stock price dips below 53. Additionally, Keefe, Bruyette & Woods analyst Vasundhara Govil upgraded Block from Market Perform to Outperform on March 18. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Jim Cramer recommends buying GRAIL, Inc. with Morgan Stanley raising its price target to $20. Jim expressed concerns about Turkcell Iletisim Hizmetleri A.S. and suggested a cautious approach for Block, Inc. Vasundhara Govil upgraded Block to Outperform.
Taiwan auction attracts bids for 1.77 times notes on offer
Netherlands Feb. Manufacturing Production Rises 1.0% Year on Year
Netherlands February industrial sales rise 1.4% year on year

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Hong Kong, the Anycubic Kobra S1 Combo defied industry norms by winning a Red Dot Design Award for its innovative engineering. This accolade was complemented by the achievement of becoming the #1 bestselling multi-color 3D printer on Amazon. This feat highlights the rare combination of design recognition and commercial success for the Kobra S1 Combo, showcasing its appeal to consumers.
news.headline: Anycubic's Kobra S1 Combo wins Red Dot Design Award and becomes Amazon's #1 bestseller in multi-color 3D printers.

news.summary: A recent report indicated that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This decline represents a significant decrease of 1.2% from the previous quarter. The data also shows that the number of employed individuals has increased by 250,000 compared to last year. Additionally, job creation has surged by 3.5% in key industries, signaling a positive trend in the labor market. Experts predict that this growth will continue in the upcoming months, boosting economic stability and consumer confidence.
news.headline: Keir Starmer's tariff approach with historical backing..

news.summary: According to recent reports, the number of COVID-19 cases in the state has reached an alarming high of over 10,000 confirmed cases. The spike in cases has been attributed to various factors, including relaxed restrictions and increased social gatherings. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to help curb the spread of the virus. Tragically, the death toll has also risen significantly, with over 500 fatalities reported in the past week alone. Hospitals are reportedly overwhelmed with patients, leading to concerns about their capacity to provide adequate care. Authorities are considering implementing stricter measures to combat the surge in cases and prevent further loss of life.
news.headline: Air France is prepared with strategies in case tariffs reduce travel demand reports.

news.summary: On Wednesday, a surge in value was witnessed in meme coins following President Donald Trump's announcement of a 90-day reciprocal tariff pause. Leading this market boom was Solana-based Fartcoin (CRYPTO: SOL), which skyrocketed by more than 40% in just 24 hours. This token, boasting a market capitalization exceeding $700 million, emerged as the top performer in the entire cryptocurrency sector. Riding on this wave, Fartcoin has recorded a remarkable monthly gain of 221%, surpassing the well-established players in the industry. Additionally, other dog-themed coins also experienced significant growth. For further details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Meme coins like Fartcoin saw a 40% surge after Trump's tariff pause, with over $700 million in market cap. Dog-themed coins also rose.

news.summary: Braden John Karony, the CEO of SafeMoon, is attempting to have the case against him and his firm dismissed by citing a recent memo from the US Department of Justice (DOJ) that stated it will no longer pursue certain crypto charges. The memo from US Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche disbands the DOJ's crypto unit and instructs prosecutors not to charge violations of securities and commodities laws requiring determinations on digital assets. The DOJ and SEC had filed charges against Karony and other SafeMoon executives in November 2023, alleging misappropriation of $200 million in investor funds. Karony's latest attempt to dismiss the case comes after a failed attempt in February to delay the trial. One executive pleaded guilty, while another is believed to be in Russia, and SafeMoon filed for bankruptcy in December 2023.
news.headline: SafeMoon CEO uses DOJ's decision to drop crypto charges in bid to dismiss case; charges allege fraud involving $200 million funds.

news.summary: The advancements in addressing inflation have come to a halt as the Federal Reserve's anticipated growth projections for 2025 have diminished. A decreasing number of central bank officials believe that they will be able to boost the economy with two additional interest rate reductions this year.
news.headline: Fed unsure of future as inflation progress stalls. Growth expectations for 2025 down. Possibly no more interest rate cuts.

news.summary: Last week, a report was released stating that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The report also found that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, beating expectations. This marks the 15th consecutive month of job growth, with the labor force participation rate also increasing to 63.2%. The report highlights various sectors experiencing growth, including healthcare, technology, and construction. Additionally, average hourly earnings saw a 2.8% increase compared to the same period last year. Experts predict that the strong job market and wage growth will continue to drive economic expansion in the coming months.
news.headline: Satellogic shifts to U.S. jurisdiction to enhance market presence and investor reach, solidifying its position.

news.summary: During President Donald Trump's first term, an anti-money-laundering law was passed to target anonymous shell companies aiding financial crimes. Now, the Trump administration is excluding tens of millions of businesses from this regulation.
news.headline: Trump admin exempts tens of millions of companies from anti-money-laundering law targeting shell companies.

news.summary: The House Financial Services Committee is emerging as a hub of ambitious Republicans, indicating a crucial moment for the GOP's slight House majority.
news.headline: GOP faces risk as House Financial Services Committee becomes hub for political ambitions, potentially impacting narrow House majority.

news.summary: Vancouver, BC, March 28, 2025 - Calibre Mining Corp. (TSX: CXB; OTCQX: CXBMF) has announced the filing and commencement of the mailing of its management information circular for the special meeting regarding the business combination with Equinox Gold Corp. (TSX: EQX; NYSE:EQX). This special meeting is for holders of Calibre common shares and options issued under Calibre’s long-term incentive plan. The circular and related materials have been sent out to stakeholders, with the meeting scheduled to take place soon.
news.headline: Calibre Mining files Circular for Special Meeting with Equinox Gold meeting materials. Shareholders to vote. TSX: CXB; OTCQX: CXBMF.

news.summary: Today marks the release of new inflation numbers, indicating the impact of Trump 2.0 trade war policies. The situation is expected to escalate further, setting the stage for more uncertainty and volatility in the near future.
news.headline: Inflation rises amidst Trump's trade war, sets stage for worsening economic conditions.

news.summary: In Guangzhou, China on April 10, 2025, TopOn Mediation has successfully received the IAB Tech Lab Open Measurement Software Development Kit (OM SDK) compliance certification. This positions them as an ad mediation platform that allows for comprehensive standardized measurement of mobile advertising across all scenarios.
news.headline: TopOn Mediation in Guangzhou, China, achieves IAB Tech Lab OM SDK certification for standardized ad measurement in mobile advertising.

news.summary: Business organizations are aiming to sway the Trump administration through hearings scheduled this week against the proposed imposition of a substantial port fee on Chinese vessels arriving at US ports. They seek to dissuade the administration from implementing this fee, which would impact the shipping costs associated with Chinese imports. This move comes as businesses are concerned about the potential financial repercussions, emphasizing the importance of maintaining a competitive market for goods and services. The fee in question could potentially amount to millions of dollars, impacting the flow of goods and trade between the two countries.
news.headline: Business groups want USTR to drop port fee on Chinese ships. Pushing against admin's plan to impose high charges.

news.summary: The upcoming Federal Reserve meeting is not expected to result in a fourth consecutive rate reduction. Investors are wondering when the next rate cut will occur and how it will impact the S&P 500. This information is crucial for stock market participants as it can influence investment decisions and market trends.
news.headline: Next Fed meeting unlikely for fourth rate cut. When will it happen? Concern for S&P 500 investors.

news.summary: Amid concerns of continued high inflation, a stable labor market, and uncertainty in policies, the Federal Reserve decided to halt rate cuts. This decision comes as President Trump introduces new policies. Consequently, the S&P 500 experienced a decline in response.
news.headline: Fed halts rate cuts due to inflation and strong job market. S&P 500 declines amid policy uncertainty.

news.summary: Discover the most recent developments within the BNB Chain network from March 17th to March 24th, 2025. This period saw significant progress in the ecosystem, with key metrics reflecting a consistent growth trend. Several new projects were introduced, showcasing the expansion and diversity within the network. Furthermore, notable upgrades were implemented during this timeframe, enhancing the overall functionality and user experience of the BNB Chain platform. Stay informed about the latest initiatives and innovations driving the ecosystem forward.
news.headline: Update on BNB Chain: Explore latest developments, metrics, projects, and upgrades from March 17 to March 24, 2025. #BNBChain #crypto

news.summary: In the fourth quarter, there was a moderate slowdown in GDP growth, while the Federal Reserve's inflation gauge maintained a recent positive trend. S&P 500 futures experienced an increase following this news. The post-Q4 GDP growth was lower than expected, but in line with forecasts for the key Fed inflation gauge. The S&P 500 saw a rise in response to these developments.
news.headline: Q4 GDP growth slows moderately, Fed's inflation in line. S&P 500 futures rise. Positive trend continues.

news.summary: BNB Chain has introduced a sizeable liquidity program amounting to $100 million, with the aim of boosting its ecosystem. This program is designed to stimulate exchange listings and provide support to projects in sectors including DeFi, AI, and gaming. Through this initiative, BNB Chain looks to encourage growth and innovation within the supported industries.
news.headline: BNB Chain launches $100M liquidity initiative to strengthen ecosystem, drive exchange listings, and support projects.

news.summary: The inflation rate, a key metric for the Federal Reserve, remains high but has shown positive trends for the second consecutive month. S&P 500 futures saw an increase, reflecting growing investor optimism. This positive trend in inflation and wage data has helped alleviate concerns prior to the imposition of tariffs. The S&P 500 index is approaching record levels amid these developments.
news.headline: Fed's inflation rate remains elevated with positive readings, easing concerns before tariffs. S&P 500 futures are up.

news.summary: Learn how the collaboration between Flower and NVIDIA FLARE is revolutionizing the federated learning domain by merging intuitive tools with high-performance runtime capabilities for effortless implementation. This partnership signifies a significant advancement in the field, promising a smoother and more efficient process for users. Explore further to delve into the details of this innovative integration.
news.headline: Federated Learning transformed with Flower & NVIDIA FLARE integration, offering user-friendly tools & industrial-grade runtime for deployment.

news.summary: President Trump's decision to postpone tariffs on Mexico led to a rebound in the S&P 500 from its earlier decline. This move showcases the ambitious nature of his economic agenda. While the launch date for the tariffs has been delayed, it underscores the high-risk strategy being pursued. It is important to note that tariffs on China remain unchanged amidst these developments.
news.headline: Trump postpones tariffs after S&P 500 drop due to high-risk plan; China tariffs still in play. Market reacts boldly.

news.summary: Together Chat has recently launched a new application that provides users with complimentary access to the DeepSeek R1 AI model, along with other AI models. This initiative aims to improve user engagement with open-source resources for coding, image creation, and various creative activities. The app is set to revolutionize interactions by offering these sophisticated AI tools at no cost to users.
news.headline: New app by Together Chat provides free access to DeepSeek R1 & other AI models, enriching interaction with open-source tools in North America.

news.summary: The likelihood of a Federal Reserve rate cut took a hit due to a moderately hawkish jobs report and an increase in inflation expectations. This development caused the chances of a rate cut by the Fed to decrease. Following this news, the S&P 500 experienced a decline.
news.headline: Hawkish job report and increased inflation expectations decrease Fed rate-cut odds, leading S&P 500 to fall.

news.summary: New data from the producer price index indicates that inflation is not as severe as previously indicated by the consumer price index. Despite this, S&P 500 futures are on the rise. However, the imposition of tariffs by President Trump is expected to prompt the Federal Reserve to maintain their current interest rates. The producer price index report suggests that inflation is still declining, contrary to concerns raised by the consumer price index. The S&P 500 is experiencing gains in response to this data.
news.headline: PPI indicates falling inflation despite CPI scare. S&P 500 rises, but Trump tariffs could stall Fed.

news.summary: The implementation of tariffs at 25% by Trump is anticipated to impact three industries with significant trade deficits starting from April 2. This is in addition to three other impending tariff deadlines. These measures target industries that display substantial trade imbalances, potentially leading to significant economic repercussions.
news.headline: Trump plans 25% tariffs on industries with trade deficits, with 4 crucial deadlines approaching.

news.summary: Gala Games has made a recent announcement regarding the discontinuation of their cryptocurrency GalaCoin. Users are being transitioned to their new platform, Treasure Tapper, with rewards being provided for previous participation. This move impacts a significant number of users who were actively using GalaCoin and marks a shift in the company's focus. Gala Games is looking to enhance user experience and engagement with this strategic decision, emphasizing the benefits of migrating to the Treasure Tapper platform.
news.headline: Gala Games switches from GalaCoin to Treasure Tapper, rewarding users for past engagement.

news.summary: Celo has announced a partnership with Alchemy to equip developers with comprehensive tools during its shift to an Ethereum Layer 2 solution. This collaboration aims to improve scalability and interoperability of the platform. The joint effort will offer developers essential resources to maximize efficiency during this transition.
news.headline: Celo teams up with Alchemy to boost Web3 development, improving scalability and interoperability for Ethereum Layer 2.

news.summary: Linea will be making a big announcement during a live event, promoting resilience during challenging market conditions. This event is expected to attract a large audience, with thousands of viewers anticipated to tune in to hear the news. Stay updated for more details on this upcoming reveal.
news.headline: Linea hints at big reveal during livestream event amidst market turmoil, urging resilience. Stay tuned for updates!

news.summary: Amid Trump's tariff threats causing turbulence for the S&P 500, there is hope from the Federal Reserve's key inflation gauge, the PCE price index. The index shows a cooling trend as spending slows down. The stock market index, S&P 500, has experienced fluctuations but managed to rise despite the uncertainties.
news.headline: Fed's PCE price index cools with slowing spending, S&P 500 rises despite Trump tariff concerns.
